name: Return Gift Bag
description: Premium paper gift bags with twisted handles. Fully customized print on front and back panels.

name: Chocolate Wrapper
description: Glossy wrappers custom-fit for standard chocolate bars. Easy peel-and-stick backing.

name: Water Bottle Label
description: Waterproof adhesive wraps. Perfect for standard 500ml water bottles. Will not smudge in ice.

name: Paper Plate
description: Heavy-duty paper plates with a high-gloss food-safe coating. Vibrant edge-to-edge printing.

name: Paper Cup
description: Durable paper cups for hot and cold beverages. Designed with an easy-grip surface.

name: Invitation Card
description: Printed on thick 350GSM matte cardstock. Includes premium white envelopes.

name: Thank You Card
description: Perfect keepsake cards for guests. Printed on premium writable cardstock.

name: Popcorn Box
description: Classic scalloped-edge popcorn and snack tubs. Fold-flat design for easy storage.

name: Juice Bottle Label
description: Customized adhesive labels for juice boxes or mini juice bottles. Matte finish.

name: Chocolate Cover (Box)
description: Sturdy gift sleeve for chocolates and truffles. High-end presentation box layout.

name: Cake Topper Design
description: Acrylic-backed thick cardstock cutout with support stick. Adds a premium look to any cake.

name: Welcome Board
description: Thick 5mm foam sunboard. Water-resistant and sturdy, perfect for entrance easels.

name: Party Hat
description: Classic cone hats with soft elastic chin bands. Includes pre-attached fluffy pom-pom accents.

name: Sticker
description: All-purpose round sticker sheets. Perfect for custom labeling bags, boxes, or cups.

name: Birthday Banner
description: Pennant banner flags spelling out HAPPY BIRTHDAY plus custom theme end-cards. Includes ribbon.

name: Cupcake Topper
description: Double-sided paper circles on wooden toothpicks. Easy decoration for cupcakes.

name: Return Gift Tag
description: Rectangular tags with pre-punched string holes. Perfect to tie onto gift bags.

name: Party Photo Props
description: Fun conversation bubbles and themed mask cutouts on sturdy wooden sticks for photo booths.

name: Cake Tablecover
description: Large plastic tablecover with checkered borders. Custom character print centered on drop sides.

name: Birthday Party Glasses
description: Sturdy cardstock party glasses. Shaped like sports cars and decorated with theme emblems.

name: 12 Months Photo Banner
description: Milestone flag garland from Month 1 to Month 12. Paste baby pictures onto custom theme card-frames.

name: Theme Arch Backdrop
description: Stretchable polyester arch backdrop banner. High definition print of patterns and theme mascots.

name: Paper Fan Set
description: Decorative pleated paper fans (pinwheels). Centers are fully customized with theme badges.

name: E-Video Invite
description: Premium animated digital video invitation. Customized text, music, and theme character animation.

name: Selfie Photobooth Frame
description: Selfie frame cutout on thick corrugated board. Holds up to 3 kids for spectacular theme photos.

name: Theme Eye Mask
description: Fancy paper masks with flexible elastic straps. Perfectly contoured to kid faces.

name: Personalized Wrist Hand Band
description: Easy snap-on soft wrist bands. Reusable, waterproof, and custom printed with the name of the child.

name: Prize Pin Badge
description: Rosette badges with ribbons and pin backings. Perfect prize badge for party games and birthday guests.

name: Vertical Welcome Door Poster
description: Vibrant door poster hanging banner. Features welcome scripts, custom name, and character artwork.

name: Themed Wall Cutout
description: Character contour wall cutouts. Perfect for backdrop decoration, wall panels, or table props.
